perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a grey flat cap and glasses introduces the video with a large Apple logo in the background. (2) Chronological cuts show three different smartphone colors: a bright orange, a deep navy blue, and a metallic silver/white. (3) A close-up view focuses on the orange smartphone mounted on a stand; a hand enters the frame pointing to the camera lenses and the back panel. (4) Scene transitions to the navy blue model, showing the glass and metal finish from various angles. (5) Transition to the silver model, highlighting the 'Super Ceramic Shield' surface as a finger slides across it. (6) The final shot displays a collage of all three colors with a question mark on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks with an enthusiastic, high-pitched tone, introducing 'iPhone 17 Pro' colors. (2) The narrator's voice remains constant as he describes the technical features of the orange phone, including battery life and material durability. (3) The music maintains a steady rhythm as the speaker shifts focus to the blue and silver models, ending with an inquisitive tone asking the audience for their preference.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'iPhone 17 Pro 全顏色' (iPhone 17 Pro All Colors) - Exciting tone. (2) Decorative Text: '宇宙橙色' (Cosmic Orange), '藏藍色' (Navy Blue), '銀色' (Silver) - Labeling the product colors. (3) Technical Hook: '4倍抗刮' (4x scratch resistant), '39小時' (39 hours) - Highlighting key specs. (4) Decorative Text: '哪個顏色燒到你？' (Which color catches your eye?) - Emotional CTA at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Showcase -> Comparative Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator in the intro; the same person's hand appears in the product close-ups.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male with glasses and a grey flat cap, wearing a white t-shirt with black graphics.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, bright white studio background featuring a large Apple logo and various tech-related social media handle overlays.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Feature Breakdown -> Engagement Question
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and generate excitement for the rumored new color options and durability specs of the iPhone 17 Pro through a dynamic visual presentation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstration and mention of specific brand-related technical features like Ceramic Shield.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host consistently wears a flat cap and uses high-density variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses fast editing and beat-matching to keep viewer attention in a short-form format.
